wordplay_note: Wilbur = will-fortress; Mercer = giver of mercy
card_description: Wilbur Mercer (meaning "Mercer = mercy / merciful") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Messianic figure experienced through empathy boxes who endlessly climbs a hill while being stoned. Name note: Wilbur = will-fortress; Mercer = giver of mercy. The collective empathy figure — even if a fraud he generates real compassion. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
work_list: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
